Production Packages

Full-day or half-day access to studio facilities — with or without a camera operator — provided by our partner, Green Light Studio. Whether you're filming a new series, recording client work, or need creative direction on set, these sessions are designed to help you produce efficiently.

DIY Package

For creators who want to bring their own camera and record independently in a prepared studio space.

  • Use of studio, lights, mic, and teleprompter
  • Bring your own camera, SD card, and laptop
  • Quiet, pre-lit space with high-quality audio capture
  • Unidirectional mic and AI noise reduction (no guarantees on outdoor noise)

Pricing:

  • Half Day (3.5 hours): 1,000 THB
  • Full Day (7 hours): 1,500 THB

Studio+ Package

For creators who want full production support — including a dedicated camera operator, setup guidance, and direction while filming.

  • Everything in the DIY package
  • Camera + operator provided
  • Assistance throughout shoot: lighting tweaks, framing, shot direction
  • Optional consultation for scripting, shot lists, or brand consistency

Pricing:

  • Half Day (3.5 hours): 2,000 THB
  • Full Day (7 hours): 3,500 THB

Booking Details

All sessions must be paid in advance to confirm. No refunds — rescheduling only. Please bring:

  • SD card (standard format)
  • Laptop (if using teleprompter)
  • Extra clothes if filming multiple looks

Payment: Bangkok Bank – 613-0-418665

Book at least 2 days in advance to reserve your slot. Once payment is confirmed, we’ll prepare the studio and send final setup details.

These services are provided in partnership with Green Light Studio. If you need help with editing, publishing, or content strategy after the shoot, let us know — full production packages are available on request.
